array.string: mkdir -p "$HOME/.piper" export XDG_DATA_HOME="$HOME/.piper/piperd" XDG_CONFIG_HOME="$HOME/.piper/piperd" export PIPER_HTTP_ADDR=":8080" PIPER_HTTPS_ADDR=":8443" set -a [ -f "$HOME/.piper/piperd.env" ] && . "$HOME/.piper/piperd.env" set +a exec >> "$HOME/.piper/piper.log" 2>> "$HOME/.piper/piper.err.log" exec /usr/local/bin/piperd
